analysis.visual_hook: Silhouette of a person against a dramatic sunset landscape.
analysis.core_message: Immerse yourself in the exclusive world of Polène's craftsmanship at their flagship store.
analysis.why_it_worked: The scenic and serene imagery creates a sense of luxury and escape, aligning the brand with the authority of high-quality craftsmanship and exclusivity.
analysis.zede_adaptation: Create an ad showcasing a model carrying a ZEDE Paris handbag in front of iconic Parisian landmarks at dusk, highlighting the exclusive experience of visiting the ZEDE boutique.
